stories.headline: Meta Develops AI Pendant Wearable That Listens All Day From Your Neck
stories.key_takeaway: Meta plans to internally test an AI-powered pendant by spring 2027, building on its Limitless acquisition, as part of an aggressive wearables strategy aimed at reversing $19 billion in annual Reality Labs losses.

pull_quote.text: Meta recently announced a new vision to bring personal superintelligence to everyone and a key part of that vision is building incredible AI-enabled wearables.

data_points.label: Wearable device sales target for H2 2026

stories.article_excerpt: Meta is building a device that hangs around your neck and listens to everything you say -- all day, every day. According to an internal memo...

stories.headline: Amazon Custom Silicon Business Crosses $20 Billion Annual Run Rate as Trainium Demand Soars
stories.key_takeaway: Amazon custom chip business hit $20B annual run rate with $225B in Trainium commitments, positioning it as a top-three global data center chip company.

pull_quote.text: If our chips business was a standalone business and sold chips produced this year to AWS and other third parties as other leading chip companies do, our annual revenue run rate would be $50 billion.

stories.article_excerpt: Amazon has quietly built one of the largest semiconductor businesses on the planet. During the company Q1 2026 earnings call in late...

stories.headline: Anthropic Opens Milan and Seoul Offices in Same Week Accelerating Global AI Expansion
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic opened offices in Milan and Seoul within 48 hours, expanding to 12 global cities as Korean Claude usage runs 3.5x above population expectations.

pull_quote.text: Korea is one of the most sophisticated AI markets in the world, leading in hardware innovation, developer activity, and enterprise adoption.

stories.article_excerpt: In the span of 48 hours this week, Anthropic planted flags on two continents, opening an office in Milan on May 27 and formally...

stories.headline: OpenAI Plans Confidential IPO Filing With September 2026 Listing in Sight
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI filed a confidential S-1 with the SEC targeting a September 2026 listing above $1 trillion valuation.

pull_quote.text: Am I excited to be a public company CEO? Zero percent. In some ways I think it will be really annoying.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI has filed a confidential S-1 registration with the SEC, setting the stage for what could become the largest technology IPO in...

stories.headline: Microsoft Commits $10 Billion to Japan AI Data Center Expansion Through 2029
stories.key_takeaway: Microsoft $10B Japan investment from 2026-2029 is its largest single-country AI infrastructure commitment, partnering with SoftBank and Sakura Internet.

pull_quote.text: Through this initiative, customers will be able to leverage SoftBank AI computing platform from within the Microsoft Azure environment, enabling them to use AI with confidence even in areas that require a high level of confidentiality and data sovereignty.

stories.article_excerpt: Microsoft is making its largest-ever bet on a single country outside the United States with a $10 billion investment in Japan...

stories.headline: OpenAI Launches Rosalind Biodefense Program With GPT-Rosalind Life Sciences Model
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI is offering its frontier biology AI model GPT-Rosalind free to government partners for pandemic preparedness and biodefense.

pull_quote.text: examining how advanced AI tools can help scientists interpret complex data and existing knowledge, identify stronger candidates
pull_quote.role: Director, Bioresilience Incubator, Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI is embedding its most advanced biology-focused AI directly into the machinery of national pandemic defense...

stories.headline: Microsoft Build 2026 Previews Windows Agent Framework and Copilot Autonomous Mode
stories.key_takeaway: Microsoft is repositioning Windows as an agent-native operating system with new Agent Framework APIs, Agent Store, and multi-model Azure AI Foundry support.

pull_quote.text: This is the beginning of a multi-year journey to fully realize the agent-native OS.

stories.article_excerpt: Microsoft Build 2026 opens in three days, and the company is not being subtle about its ambitions...

stories.headline: DuckDuckGo Installs Surge 30 Percent as Users Reject Google AI Search Overhaul
stories.key_takeaway: DuckDuckGo U.S. app installs surged 30.5% and daily queries hit a record 145M+ after Google I/O announced a full AI overhaul of Search.

pull_quote.text: Google is force-feeding AI with no way to opt out. As a result, their results are getting worse, not better.

stories.article_excerpt: Google told the world it was replacing its iconic blue links with AI agents. Within a week, DuckDuckGo had its best stretch of growth...

stories.headline: Anthropic Commits 5 Gigawatts of Trainium Capacity Outpacing OpenAI Two and a Half to One
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic secured the most diversified compute portfolio in the AI industry, committing 5GW of Trainium capacity from AWS alongside SpaceX, Akamai, and Google Cloud.

pull_quote.text: That is the reason we have had difficulties with compute

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic is not just racing to build the best AI models. It is racing to secure the electricity to run them...

stories.headline: Project Glasswing Finds 10,000 Vulnerabilities in 30 Days Shifting Cybersecurity Bottleneck From Discovery to Remediation
stories.key_takeaway: AI-powered vulnerability discovery has outpaced human remediation capacity, with only 75 of 530 disclosed high-severity bugs patched so far.

pull_quote.text: Progress on software security used to be limited by how quickly we could find new vulnerabilities. Now it is limited by how quickly we can verify, disclose, and patch the large numbers of vulnerabilities found by AI.

stories.article_excerpt: For decades, the central constraint in software security was the same: finding vulnerabilities before attackers did...

stories.headline: IBM Joins Project Glasswing Bringing Concert Security Platform to Vulnerability Consortium
stories.key_takeaway: IBM joined Glasswing on May 19 bringing its Concert vulnerability management platform and decades of mainframe security expertise to a coalition of ~50 organizations.

pull_quote.text: AI-powered attacks have already moved beyond what traditional defenses can match.
pull_quote.role: SVP Software and Chief Commercial Officer, IBM

data_points.label: Reduction in CVE resolution time with Concert

stories.article_excerpt: When Anthropic launched Project Glasswing on April 7, it assembled a who is-who of technology titans committed to finding and fixing...

stories.headline: Johnson and Johnson Partners With NVIDIA Isaac to Advance AI-Powered Surgical Robotics
stories.key_takeaway: J&J MedTech is using NVIDIA Isaac for Healthcare to build physics-based digital twins of its MONARCH surgical robot as the market races toward $49.1B by 2034.

pull_quote.text: Simulation is the next frontier in surgical robotics. With AI-driven simulation, we can create high-fidelity digital twins that adhere to the laws of physics.
pull_quote.role: SVP and Global Head of Robotics, Johnson and Johnson MedTech

data_points.label: Reduction in operative time with AI surgery

stories.article_excerpt: The operating room of the future will not simply feature a surgeon and a scalpel. It will feature a surgeon, an AI-powered robotic platform...

stories.headline: Cloudflare Builds Split-Architecture Infrastructure for Running LLMs at Global Scale
stories.key_takeaway: Cloudflare splits LLM inference into separate prefill and decode stages on different machines, achieving 3x inter-token latency improvement.

pull_quote.text: There are two stages to processing an LLM request: prefill, which processes the input tokens and populates the KV cache, and decode, which generates output tokens.
pull_quote.attribution: Michelle Chen, Kevin Flansburg, and Vlad Krasnov

stories.article_excerpt: When you ask a large language model to summarize a document or write a function, two very different computational tasks happen...

stories.headline: Korean Intelligence Agencies Explore Mythos Cybersecurity Access Through Anthropic Partnership
stories.key_takeaway: Six South Korean government agencies including the NIS held formal cybersecurity cooperation talks with Anthropic requesting access to Mythos for defense against North Korean cyber threats.

pull_quote.text: Advanced AI security threats are like a cold virus -- they cannot be completely blocked but must be managed as we live alongside them.

data_points.label: Stolen by DPRK cyber groups in 2025

stories.article_excerpt: South Korea is moving aggressively to secure access to Anthropic restricted Mythos cybersecurity model, with six government agencies...

stories.headline: AI Washing Intensifies as Companies Rebrand Legacy Tech to Ride the Hype Wave
stories.key_takeaway: The SEC has created a dedicated enforcement unit targeting AI washing with multiple actions filed against companies making misleading AI claims.

pull_quote.text: The due diligence checklist in fund selection is clearly going to change.

data_points.label: Funds raised through misleading AI claims
Max EU AI Act fine for misrepresentation

stories.article_excerpt: The artificial intelligence gold rush has produced a predictable side effect: companies across every sector are slapping the AI label...
